1â†’// Package main provides the entry point for the CLI Proxy API server.
     2â†’// This server acts as a proxy that provides OpenAI/Gemini/Claude compatible API interfaces
     3â†’// for CLI models, allowing CLI models to be used with tools and libraries designed for standard AI APIs.
     4â†’package main
     5â†’
     6â†’import (
     7â†’	"context"
     8â†’	"errors"
     9â†’	"flag"
    10â†’	"fmt"
    11â†’	"io"
    12â†’	"io/fs"
    13â†’	"net/url"
    14â†’	"os"
    15â†’	"path/filepath"
    16â†’	"strings"
    17â†’	"time"
    18â†’
    19â†’	"github.com/joho/godotenv"
    20â†’	configaccess "github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/access/config_access"
    21â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/buildinfo"
    22â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/cmd"
    23â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/config"
    24â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/logging"
    25â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/managementasset"
    26â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/misc"
    27â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/registry"
    28â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/store"
    29â†’	_ "github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/translator"
    30â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/tui"
    31â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/usage"
    32â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/util"
    33â†’	sdkAuth "github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/sdk/auth"
    34â†’	coreauth "github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/sdk/cliproxy/auth"
    35â†’	log "github.com/sirupsen/logrus"
    36â†’)
    37â†’
    38â†’var (
    39â†’	Version           = "dev"
    40â†’	Commit            = "none"
    41â†’	BuildDate         = "unknown"
    42â†’	DefaultConfigPath = ""
    43â†’)
    44â†’
    45â†’// init initializes the shared logger setup.
    46â†’func init() {
    47â†’	logging.SetupBaseLogger()
    48â†’	buildinfo.Version = Version
    49â†’	buildinfo.Commit = Commit
    50â†’	buildinfo.BuildDate = BuildDate
    51â†’}
    52â†’
    53â†’// main is the entry point of the application.
    54â†’// It parses command-line flags, loads configuration, and starts the appropriate
    55â†’// service based on the provided flags (login, codex-login, or server mode).
    56â†’func main() {
    57â†’	fmt.Printf("CLIProxyAPI Version: %s, Commit: %s, BuiltAt: %s\n", buildinfo.Version, buildinfo.Commit, buildinfo.BuildDate)
    58â†’
    59â†’	// Command-line flags to control the application's behavior.
    60â†’	var login bool
    61â†’	var codexLogin bool
    62â†’	var codexDeviceLogin bool
    63â†’	var claudeLogin bool
    64â†’	var qwenLogin bool
    65â†’	var iflowLogin bool
    66â†’	var iflowCookie bool
    67â†’	var noBrowser bool
    68â†’	var oauthCallbackPort int
    69â†’	var antigravityLogin bool
    70â†’	var kimiLogin bool
    71â†’	var projectID string
    72â†’	var vertexImport string
    73â†’	var configPath string
    74â†’	var password string
    75â†’	var tuiMode bool
    76â†’	var standalone bool
    77â†’	var localModel bool
    78â†’
    79â†’	// Define command-line flags for different operation modes.
    80â†’	flag.BoolVar(&login, "login", false, "Login Google Account")
    81â†’	flag.BoolVar(&codexLogin, "codex-login", false, "Login to Codex using OAuth")
    82â†’	flag.BoolVar(&codexDeviceLogin, "codex-device-login", false, "Login to Codex using device code flow")
    83â†’	flag.BoolVar(&claudeLogin, "claude-login", false, "Login to Claude using OAuth")
    84â†’	flag.BoolVar(&qwenLogin, "qwen-login", false, "Login to Qwen using OAuth")
    85â†’	flag.BoolVar(&iflowLogin, "iflow-login", false, "Login to iFlow using OAuth")
    86â†’	flag.BoolVar(&iflowCookie, "iflow-cookie", false, "Login to iFlow using Cookie")
    87â†’	flag.BoolVar(&noBrowser, "no-browser", false, "Don't open browser automatically for OAuth")
    88â†’	flag.IntVar(&oauthCallbackPort, "oauth-callback-port", 0, "Override OAuth callback port (defaults to provider-specific port)")
    89â†’	flag.BoolVar(&antigravityLogin, "antigravity-login", false, "Login to Antigravity using OAuth")
    90â†’	flag.BoolVar(&kimiLogin, "kimi-login", false, "Login to Kimi using OAuth")
    91â†’	flag.StringVar(&projectID, "project_id", "", "Project ID (Gemini only, not required)")
    92â†’	flag.StringVar(&configPath, "config", DefaultConfigPath, "Configure File Path")
    93â†’	flag.StringVar(&vertexImport, "vertex-import", "", "Import Vertex service account key JSON file")
    94â†’	flag.StringVar(&password, "password", "", "")
    95â†’	flag.BoolVar(&tuiMode, "tui", false, "Start with terminal management UI")
    96â†’	flag.BoolVar(&standalone, "standalone", false, "In TUI mode, start an embedded local server")
    97â†’	flag.BoolVar(&localModel, "local-model", false, "Use embedded model catalog only, skip remote model fetching")
    98â†’
    99â†’	flag.CommandLine.Usage = func() {
   100â†’		out := flag.CommandLine.Output()
   101â†’		_, _ = fmt.Fprintf(out, "Usage of %s\n", os.Args[0])
   102â†’		flag.CommandLine.VisitAll(func(f *flag.Flag) {
   103â†’			if f.Name == "password" {
   104â†’				return
   105â†’			}
   106â†’			s := fmt.Sprintf("  -%s", f.Name)
   107â†’			name, unquoteUsage := flag.UnquoteUsage(f)
   108â†’			if name != "" {
   109â†’				s += " " + name
   110â†’			}
   111â†’			if len(s) <= 4 {
   112â†’				s += "	"
   113â†’			} else {
   114â†’				s += "\n    "
   115â†’			}
   116â†’			if unquoteUsage != "" {
   117â†’				s += unquoteUsage
   118â†’			}
   119â†’			if f.DefValue != "" && f.DefValue != "false" && f.DefValue != "0" {
   120â†’				s += fmt.Sprintf(" (default %s)", f.DefValue)
   121â†’			}
   122â†’			_, _ = fmt.Fprint(out, s+"\n")
   123â†’		})
   124â†’	}
   125â†’
   126â†’	// Parse the command-line flags.
   127â†’	flag.Parse()
   128â†’
   129â†’	// Core application variables.
   130â†’	var err error
   131â†’	var cfg *config.Config
   132â†’	var isCloudDeploy bool
   133â†’	var (
   134â†’		usePostgresStore     bool
   135â†’		pgStoreDSN           string
   136â†’		pgStoreSchema        string
   137â†’		pgStoreLocalPath     string
   138â†’		pgStoreInst          *store.PostgresStore
   139â†’		useGitStore          bool
   140â†’		gitStoreRemoteURL    string
   141â†’		gitStoreUser         string
   142â†’		gitStorePassword     string
   143â†’		gitStoreLocalPath    string
   144â†’		gitStoreInst         *store.GitTokenStore
   145â†’		gitStoreRoot         string
   146â†’		useObjectStore       bool
   147â†’		objectStoreEndpoint  string
   148â†’		objectStoreAccess    string
   149â†’		objectStoreSecret    string
   150â†’		objectStoreBucket    string
   151â†’		objectStoreLocalPath string
   152â†’		objectStoreInst      *store.ObjectTokenStore
   153â†’	)
   154â†’
   155â†’	wd, err := os.Getwd()
   156â†’	if err != nil {
   157â†’		log.Errorf("failed to get working directory: %v", err)
   158â†’		return
   159â†’	}
   160â†’
   161â†’	// Load environment variables from .env if present.
   162â†’	if errLoad := godotenv.Load(filepath.Join(wd, ".env")); errLoad != nil {
   163â†’		if !errors.Is(errLoad, os.ErrNotExist) {
   164â†’			log.WithError(errLoad).Warn("failed to load .env file")
   165â†’		}
   166â†’	}
   167â†’
   168â†’	lookupEnv := func(keys ...string) (string, bool) {
   169â†’		for _, key := range keys {
   170â†’			if value, ok := os.LookupEnv(key); ok {
   171â†’				if trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(value); trimmed != "" {
   172â†’					return trimmed, true
   173â†’				}
   174â†’			}
   175â†’		}
   176â†’		return "", false
   177â†’	}
   178â†’	writableBase := util.WritablePath()
   179â†’	if value, ok := lookupEnv("PGSTORE_DSN", "pgstore_dsn"); ok {
   180â†’		usePostgresStore = true
   181â†’		pgStoreDSN = value
   182â†’	}
   183â†’	if usePostgresStore {
   184â†’		if value, ok := lookupEnv("PGSTORE_SCHEMA", "pgstore_schema"); ok {
   185â†’			pgStoreSchema = value
   186â†’		}
   187â†’		if value, ok := lookupEnv("PGSTORE_LOCAL_PATH", "pgstore_local_path"); ok {
   188â†’			pgStoreLocalPath = value
   189â†’		}
   190â†’		if pgStoreLocalPath == "" {
   191â†’			if writableBase != "" {
   192â†’				pgStoreLocalPath = writableBase
   193â†’			} else {
   194â†’				pgStoreLocalPath = wd
   195â†’			}
   196â†’		}
   197â†’		useGitStore = false
   198â†’	}
   199â†’	if value, ok := lookupEnv("GITSTORE_GIT_URL", "gitstore_git_url"); ok {
   200â†’		useGitStore = true
   201â†’		gitStoreRemoteURL = value
   202â†’	}
   203â†’	if value, ok := lookupEnv("GITSTORE_GIT_USERNAME", "gitstore_git_username"); ok {
   204â†’		gitStoreUser = value
   205â†’	}
   206â†’	if value, ok := lookupEnv("GITSTORE_GIT_TOKEN", "gitstore_git_token"); ok {
   207â†’		gitStorePassword = value
   208â†’	}
   209â†’	if value, ok := lookupEnv("GITSTORE_LOCAL_PATH", "gitstore_local_path"); ok {
   210â†’		gitStoreLocalPath = value
   211â†’	}
   212â†’	if value, ok := lookupEnv("OBJECTSTORE_ENDPOINT", "objectstore_endpoint"); ok {
   213â†’		useObjectStore = true
   214â†’		objectStoreEndpoint = value
   215â†’	}
   216â†’	if value, ok := lookupEnv("OBJECTSTORE_ACCESS_KEY", "objectstore_access_key"); ok {
   217â†’		objectStoreAccess = value
   218â†’	}
   219â†’	if value, ok := lookupEnv("OBJECTSTORE_SECRET_KEY", "objectstore_secret_key"); ok {
   220â†’		objectStoreSecret = value

1â†’// Package claude provides response translation functionality for Codex to Claude Code API compatibility.
     2â†’// This package handles the conversion of Codex API responses into Claude Code-compatible
     3â†’// Server-Sent Events (SSE) format, implementing a sophisticated state machine that manages
     4â†’// different response types including text content, thinking processes, and function calls.
     5â†’// The translation ensures proper sequencing of SSE events and maintains state across
     6â†’// multiple response chunks to provide a seamless streaming experience.
     7â†’package claude
     8â†’
     9â†’import (
    10â†’	"bytes"
    11â†’	"context"
    12â†’	"strings"
    13â†’
    14â†’	translatorcommon "github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/translator/common"
    15â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/translator/gptinclaude"
    16â†’	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/util"
    17â†’	"github.com/tidwall/gjson"
    18â†’	"github.com/tidwall/sjson"
    19â†’)
    20â†’
    21â†’var (
    22â†’	dataTag = []byte("data:")
    23â†’)
    24â†’
    25â†’// ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams holds parameters for response conversion.
    26â†’type ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams struct {
    27â†’	HasToolCall                        bool
    28â†’	BlockIndex                         int
    29â†’	HasReceivedArgumentsDelta          bool
    30â†’	SkipNextSyntheticWebSearchStart    bool
    31â†’	LastBuiltinWebSearchQuery          string
    32â†’	LastToolProgressCategory           string
    33â†’	EmittedSyntheticWebSearchStarts    map[string]struct{}
    34â†’	EmittedSyntheticWebSearchCompletes map[string]struct{}
    35â†’}
    36â†’
    37â†’// ConvertCodexResponseToClaude performs sophisticated streaming response format conversion.
    38â†’// This function implements a complex state machine that translates Codex API responses
    39â†’// into Claude Code-compatible Server-Sent Events (SSE) format. It manages different response types
    40â†’// and handles state transitions between content blocks, thinking processes, and function calls.
    41â†’//
    42â†’// Response type states: 0=none, 1=content, 2=thinking, 3=function
    43â†’// The function maintains state across multiple calls to ensure proper SSE event sequencing.
    44â†’//
    45â†’// Parameters:
    46â†’//   - ctx: The context for the request, used for cancellation and timeout handling
    47â†’//   - modelName: The name of the model being used for the response (unused in current implementation)
    48â†’//   - rawJSON: The raw JSON response from the Codex API
    49â†’//   - param: A pointer to a parameter object for maintaining state between calls
    50â†’//
    51â†’// Returns:
    52â†’//   - [][]byte: A slice of Claude Code-compatible JSON responses
    53â†’func ConvertCodexResponseToClaude(ctx context.Context, _ string, originalRequestRawJSON, requestRawJSON, rawJSON []byte, param *any) [][]byte {
    54â†’	if *param == nil {
    55â†’		initialQuery := gptinclaude.InferBuiltinWebSearchQuery(originalRequestRawJSON)
    56â†’		*param = &ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams{
    57â†’			HasToolCall:                        false,
    58â†’			BlockIndex:                         0,
    59â†’			LastBuiltinWebSearchQuery:          initialQuery,
    60â†’			EmittedSyntheticWebSearchStarts:    map[string]struct{}{},
    61â†’			EmittedSyntheticWebSearchCompletes: map[string]struct{}{},
    62â†’		}
    63â†’	}
    64â†’
    65â†’	// log.Debugf("rawJSON: %s", string(rawJSON))
    66â†’	if !bytes.HasPrefix(rawJSON, dataTag) {
    67â†’		return [][]byte{}
    68â†’	}
    69â†’	rawJSON = bytes.TrimSpace(rawJSON[5:])
    70â†’
    71â†’	output := make([]byte, 0, 512)
    72â†’	rootResult := gjson.ParseBytes(rawJSON)
    73â†’	typeResult := rootResult.Get("type")
    74â†’	typeStr := typeResult.String()
    75â†’	clientKind := gptinclaude.DetectClientKind(ctx)
    76â†’	var template []byte
    77â†’	if typeStr == "response.created" {
    78â†’		template = []byte(`{"type":"message_start","message":{"id":"","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-1-20250805","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0},"content":[],"stop_reason":null}}`)
    79â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "message.model", rootResult.Get("response.model").String())
    80â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "message.id", rootResult.Get("response.id").String())
    81â†’
    82â†’		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "message_start", template, 2)
    83â†’		if gptinclaude.ShouldEmitSyntheticWebSearchTag(clientKind) && gptinclaude.ShouldPreEmitBuiltinWebSearchProgress(originalRequestRawJSON) {
    84â†’			syntheticText := gptinclaude.BuildSyntheticWebSearchToolCallTextFromRequest(originalRequestRawJSON)
    85â†’			if syntheticText != "" {
    86â†’				blockIndex := (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex
    87â†’
    88â†’				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"text","text":""}}`)
    89â†’				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
    90â†’				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_start", template, 2)
    91â†’
    92â†’				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":""}}`)
    93â†’				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
    94â†’				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.text", syntheticText)
    95â†’				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_delta", template, 2)

    98â†’				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)

   100â†’
   101â†’				(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex++
   102â†’				(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).SkipNextSyntheticWebSearchStart = true
   103â†’			}
   104â†’		} else if gptinclaude.ShouldEmitVSCodeWebSearchProgress(clientKind) && gptinclaude.ShouldPreEmitBuiltinWebSearchProgress(originalRequestRawJSON) {
   105â†’			progressThinking := gptinclaude.BuildVSCodeWebSearchProgressThinking(
   106â†’				gjson.Result{},
   107â†’				(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).LastBuiltinWebSearchQuery,

   109â†’			if progressThinking != "" {
   110â†’				blockIndex := (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex
   111â†’
   112â†’				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"thinking","thinking":""}}`)
   113â†’				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
   114â†’				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_start", template, 2)
   115â†’
   116â†’				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"thinking_delta","thinking":""}}`)
   117â†’				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
   118â†’				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.thinking", progressThinking)
   119â†’				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_delta", template, 2)
   120â†’
   121â†’				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}`)
   122â†’				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
   123â†’				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_stop", template, 2)
   124â†’
   125â†’				(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex++
   126â†’			}
   127â†’		}
   128â†’	} else if typeStr == "response.reasoning_summary_part.added" {
   129â†’		if !gptinclaude.ShouldSurfaceReasoningSummaryAsThinking(clientKind) {
   130â†’			return [][]byte{output}
   131â†’		}
   132â†’		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"thinking","thinking":""}}`)
   133â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)
   134â†’
   135â†’		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_start", template, 2)
   136â†’	} else if typeStr == "response.reasoning_summary_text.delta" {
   137â†’		if !gptinclaude.ShouldSurfaceReasoningSummaryAsThinking(clientKind) {
   138â†’			return [][]byte{output}
   139â†’		}
   140â†’		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"thinking_delta","thinking":""}}`)
   141â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)
   142â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.thinking", rootResult.Get("delta").String())
   143â†’
   144â†’		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_delta", template, 2)
   145â†’	} else if typeStr == "response.reasoning_summary_part.done" {
   146â†’		if !gptinclaude.ShouldSurfaceReasoningSummaryAsThinking(clientKind) {

   148â†’		}
   149â†’		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}`)
   150â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)

   152â†’
   153â†’		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_stop", template, 2)
   154â†’
   155â†’	} else if typeStr == "response.content_part.added" {
   156â†’		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"text","text":""}}`)
   157â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)
   158â†’
   159â†’		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_start", template, 2)
   160â†’	} else if typeStr == "response.output_text.delta" {
   161â†’		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":""}}`)

   164â†’
   165â†’		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_delta", template, 2)
   166â†’	} else if typeStr == "response.content_part.done" {
   167â†’		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}`)
   168â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)

   170â†’
   171â†’		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_stop", template, 2)
   172â†’	} else if typeStr == "response.completed" {
   173â†’		template = []byte(`{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0}}`)
   174â†’		p := (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).HasToolCall
   175â†’		stopReason := rootResult.Get("response.stop_reason").String()

   179â†’			template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.stop_reason", stopReason)
   180â†’		} else {
   181â†’			template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.stop_reason", "end_turn")
   182â†’		}
   183â†’		inputTokens, outputTokens, cachedTokens := extractResponsesUsage(rootResult.Get("response.usage"))
   184â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "usage.input_tokens", inputTokens)
   185â†’		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "usage.output_tokens", outputTokens)

   187â†’			template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "usage.cache_read_input_tokens", cachedTokens)

   189â†’
   190â†’		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "message_delta", template, 2)
   191â†’		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "message_stop", []byte(`{"type":"message_stop"}`), 2)
   192â†’	} else if typeStr == "response.output_item.added" {
   193â†’		itemResult := rootResult.Get("item")
   194â†’		itemType := itemResult.Get("type").String()
   195â†’		if itemType == "function_call" {
   196â†’			(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).HasToolCall = true
   197â†’			(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).HasReceivedArgumentsDelta = false
   198â†’			toolName := itemResult.Get("name").String()
   199â†’			{

   201â†’				rev := buildReverseMapFromClaudeOriginalShortToOriginal(originalRequestRawJSON)

   205â†’			}

   208â†’					category != (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).LastToolProgressCategory {

   210â†’
   211â†’					template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"text","text":""}}`)
   212â†’					template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
   213â†’					output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_start", template, 2)
   214â†’
   215â†’					template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":""}}`)
   216â†’					template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
   217â†’					template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.text", progressText)
   218â†’					output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_delta", template, 2)
   219â†’
   220â†’					template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}`)

content.text:
Searching the web.

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"query":"Read AGENTS.md and inspect the repository. Tell me the main HTTP server entrypoint and one translator package worth inspecting. Keep it concise and do not use web search."},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

- Main HTTP server entrypoint: `cmd/server/main.go:56` (`main()`), which bootstraps config and starts the server stack.
- One translator package worth inspecting: `internal/translator/codex/claude` â€” especially `internal/translator/codex/claude/codex_claude_response.go:53`, since it handles Codexâ†’Claude SSE/stream translation and tool/progress event shaping.

`AGENTS.md` mainly points to project/task context and docs, not a different runtime entrypoint.
